templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: A mutual NDA allowing two parties to disclose confidential information to each other for an agreed purpose, with standard confidentiality, exceptions, and return/destruction obligations.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: A SaaS/cloud services agreement covering access and use of a cloud service, support, privacy and security, payment, term and termination, warranties, liability, indemnification, and confidentiality.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: An early-access agreement for design partners who receive product access in exchange for feedback and participation in a provider's product development program.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Defines uptime and response time targets for a cloud service, how they are measured, and the service credit remedies available if targets are missed.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: A master services agreement for professional services engagements governed by individual statements of work (SOWs), covering deliverables, IP, payment, warranties, liability, and insurance.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: A GDPR/UK GDPR-oriented data processing agreement covering processor/subprocessor obligations, international data transfers (EEA SCCs / UK Addendum), security incident response, audits, and deletion of personal data.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: An on-premises/installed software license agreement covering license grant, restrictions, updates, open source components, warranties, liability, and confidentiality.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: A general business partnership/co-marketing agreement covering mutual obligations, fees, trademark licensing of brand elements, privacy, escalation procedures, and standard legal terms.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: A short-term evaluation agreement allowing a customer to trial a product for evaluation purposes before entering into a longer-term definitive agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: A HIPAA business associate agreement governing a business associate's use and disclosure of protected health information (PHI) on behalf of a covered entity, including safeguards and breach notification.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: A supplemental addendum to an existing agreement governing the use of AI/ML services, including input/output ownership, model training restrictions, and AI-specific disclaimers.
